text: Hey, I just noticed a fee on my statement from my last card payment? What is that about? I don’t recall any fee.

Hi there, I just checked my account and noticed a payment that I don't remember making at all. It's really confusing because I thought I had only made a couple of small purchases recently, but this one is totally out of the blue. Can you look into this for me? I feel like there might be a mistake or something, but I also worry that it might be something else, even though I can't think of any reason for it. Thanks!
I regret to inform you that my card has been trapped in the ATM. I would appreciate your assistance in retrieving it.
Tried to pay with my card but it didn’t go through. I mean, it worked yesterday! Why is it declined now? Makes no sense!

Hey there! So, I made this payment a while ago, and it still hasn't shown up in my account. I even checked my transaction history multiple times, but it's like my money just vanished into thin air! I really need this sorted because I was counting on those funds for a bill coming up, and it's stressing me out. Can you please help me figure out what’s going on?
